_comment: UX Interaction Skill Scorecard — fill in values for any screen or flow analysis

useful._comment_score: 1-5. 5 = every element serves user goal. 1 = screen serves platform, not user.

equitable.dark_pattern_type: one-sided-disclosure | empty-state-upsell | false-urgency | hidden-tier | confirm-shaming | roach-motel | none
equitable._comment_risk: true if gains and losses shown with equal weight. null if not applicable.

enjoyable._comment_squint: pass = one dominant element visible when eyes blurred. fail = equal weight throughout.
enjoyable._comment_blocks: Count of distinct visual blocks without scrolling. Target: 4 or fewer.

priority_issues._comment_p0: Compliance / user safety. Must fix before launch.
priority_issues._comment_p1: Primary path friction. Causes measurable drop-off.
priority_issues._comment_p2: Retention / delight. Important but not blocking.

_comment_patterns: Pattern names from pattern-library.md that were cited in recommendations
